title: potentilla ruderalis
intro: Potentilla ruderalis, also known as cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Potentilla ruderalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health issues, from minor cuts and scrapes to more serious conditions like eczema and acne.
